meaning_english: A general view from above or a comprehensive overview.
Someone who seems unfriendly and does not share their feelings.
A person or thing that is open to general ridicule.
An insult disguised as a compliment.
An unattainable or fanciful hope or plan.

meaning_kannada: ಮುಜುಗರ ತರುವ ಹಳೆಯ ರಹಸ್ಯ (Mujugara taruva rahasya)
meaning_english: An embarrassing fact about someone that is kept secret.
A foolish and hopeless search for or pursuit of something unattainable.

meaning_kannada: ಸ್ವಾರ್ಥದ ಉದ್ದೇಶ ಅಥವಾ ಹಳೆಯ ದೂರು (Swarthada uddesha)
meaning_english: Having a selfish reason or a private complaint.
To be bitterly hostile towards each other.
To be in strong disagreement.

meaning_kannada: ಅನಿವಾರ್ಯವಾದ ಕಷ್ಟವನ್ನು ಧೈರ್ಯದಿಂದ ಎದುರಿಸುವುದು (Kashtavannu dhairyadinda edurisuvudu)
meaning_english: To endure a painful or difficult situation that is unavoidable.

meaning_kannada: ಮಾತು ಪ್ರಾರಂಭಿಸಿ ಮುಜುಗರ ದೂರ ಮಾಡುವುದು (Matu prarambhisuvudu)
meaning_english: To start a conversation and make people feel more comfortable.

word: Burn the candle at both ends
meaning_english: To work excessively hard and exhaust oneself.

meaning_kannada: ಹಳೆಯ ವಿಷಯಗಳ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಆಳವಾಗಿ ಯೋಚಿಸುವುದು (Alavagi yochisuvudu)
meaning_english: To ponder or meditate on something for a long time.

meaning_kannada: ಸುಳ್ಳು ಕಣ್ಣೀರು ಅಥವಾ ಕಪಟ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಪಡಿಸುವುದು (Sullu kanniru)
meaning_english: False or insincere display of grief.

meaning_kannada: ಸಿಗಲಾರದ ವಸ್ತುವಿಗಾಗಿ ಹಠ ಮಾಡುವುದು (Sigalarada vastuvigagi hatha)
meaning_english: To ask for something that is impossible to get.
To try to get someone's approval by using praise or flattery.

meaning_kannada: ಒಬ್ಬರನ್ನೇ ಹೋಲುವ ಇನ್ನೊಬ್ಬ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿ (Obbaranne holuva vyakti)
meaning_english: A person who looks exactly like another person.

meaning_kannada: ತಾನು ಹೇಳಿದ್ದು ತಪ್ಪು ಎಂದು ಒಪ್ಪಿಕೊಳ್ಳುವುದು (Tappu oppikolluvudu)
meaning_english: To admit that what one said was wrong.

meaning_kannada: ಒಳ್ಳೆಯ ವಿಷಯದಲ್ಲಿ ಅಡ್ಡಿಪಡಿಸುವ ಸಣ್ಣ ತೊಂದರೆ (Sanna tondare)
meaning_english: A minor problem that spoils a pleasant situation.
The ability to speak easily and confidently.
Strict and fixed rules that cannot be changed.
Spending more money than you earn; in debt.
A slang term meaning 'to die'.
The ability to turn any business venture into a success.
Without any preparation or planning.
Likely to happen.
Excessive bureaucracy or adherence to official rules.

meaning_kannada: ಬಹಳ ಒಳ್ಳೆಯ ಮತ್ತು ಪ್ರಾಮಾಣಿಕ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿ (Pramanika vyakti)
meaning_english: A person who is very good, honest, and kind.
To ignore what someone says.
